title: Effect of Vitamin D Supplementation on Polycystic Ovary Syndrome: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
abstract: Vitamin D deficiency is associated with metabolic and endocrine disorders in polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). However, the effects of vitamin D supplementation on PCOS remain controversial.
journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism
